decisions.rationale: Observation maps to its own base_record_id route_b44-sbs. The source (20111205_nostrand_cb3_slides) confirms B44 SBS service on Nostrand/Rogers corridor: p002_c0003 describes 'Currently served by B44 bus route' and p011_c0003 specifies 'Southbound B44 SBS on Nostrand Ave' and 'Northbound B44 SBS on Bedford Ave'. Registry card route_b44-sbs already represents the B44 Select Bus Service with matching route_id (B44), route_type (select_bus_service), and borough (Brooklyn), and already lists this source among its source_ids. Per canonicalize rules, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, decision is 'new'.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Currently served by B44 bus route
• Southbound B44 SBS on Nostrand Ave in Offset Bus Lane • Northbound B44 SBS on Bedford Ave
